issues.claim: Analog not reconstructible from chapter alone
issues.objection: Removed-verse test for 7.25: if 7.25 were removed from the source pack, the chapter alone would not produce this specific engineering analog. The analog depends on the verse's specific structural claim (thread 3 (yoga-māyā veiling; heavily STRETCHED)), which is not stated equivalently elsewhere in the chapter. Tags (observability, operator-system-coupling, instrumentation) anchor on this verse's specific claim. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims a metaphysical concealment (yoga-māyā-samāvṛtaḥ). Engineering analog cannot inherit the metaphysical claim; operates at the operational scope of dashboards-as-designed-surfaces. Counter-example: senior gatekeeping is engineering pathology, not yoga-māyā at operational scope.

notes: Removed-verse test for 7.25: analog is anchored on this verse's specific structural claim, not on chapter-level material alone. PASS.
